verdict.answer_first: B states the immediate constraint/action in sentence 1: "tell me...where the public API lives"; A starts with meta: "No answer needed" before the plan.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits to one next action: "tell me...a path or repo"; A surveys dimensions, algorithms, placement, stores, libraries, and tiers.
verdict.fabrication: A invents more context: "this repo has no public API" and "/Users/elon/work/fable-profile"; B also says "nothing in `fable-profile` receives inbound requests".
verdict.actionability: A is easier to execute because it gives concrete defaults: "token bucket", "Redis", "HTTP 429", "Retry-After", "shadow mode"; B only asks for location.
